description: MCP server for Check Point Harmony Email & Collaboration (Avanan) email security.
name: io.github.wyre-technology/avanan-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Avanan / Harmony Email API client ID
environmentVariables.name: AVANAN_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Avanan / Harmony Email API client secret
environmentVariables.name: AVANAN_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Avanan API base URL — defaults to the standard Harmony Email endpoint if omitted
environmentVariables.name: AVANAN_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Transport mode for the server. Set to 'stdio' for local CLI use; the image defaults to 'http' for gateway hosting.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT

environmentVariables.description: Credential source: 'env' reads vars locally, 'gateway' expects header injection from the WYRE MCP Gateway.
environmentVariables.name: AUTH_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn, error
environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL

title: Avanan
